title: Confidentiality
doc_html:
§1194. Confidentiality

            All records and deliberations concerning a request for expungement shall be confidential and shall not be made available to any person or other entity, except that any such record shall be available to each member of the Board of Ethics and its staff.

            Acts 2015, No. 316, §1.
doc_text:
§1194.  Confidentiality
All records and deliberations concerning a request for expungement shall be
confidential and shall not be made available to any person or other entity, except that any
such record shall be available to each member of the Board of Ethics and its staff.
Acts 2015, No. 316, §1.
